title: B.S. Computer Science
organization: San Francisco Bay University · Fremont, CA
description: B.S. in Computer Science (expected Dec 2027). GPA: 3.85. Coursework spans Data Structures, AI, Algorithms, ML, Deep Learning, Multi-Agent Systems, Cloud Computing, Computer Vision, NLP, MCP, and FastAPI—applied in parallel through internships, hackathons, and personal builds.
